parsers.description: Collecte les logs CloudTrail AWS (JSON). Normalise en OCSF classe 6003 (API Activity).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# AWS CloudTrail — JSON logs (via S3/SQS or file)
# OCSF Class : 6003 (API Activity)
# Input      : HTTP (JSON) or File
# Tested with: CloudTrail JSON format, AWS
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.cloudtrail_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8516}"
encoding = "json"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.cloudtrail_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["cloudtrail_input"]
source = '''
  raw_msg = encode_json(.)

  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # CloudTrail JSON structure :
  # eventVersion, eventTime, eventSource, eventName, awsRegion,
  # sourceIPAddress, userAgent, userIdentity.{type, arn, accountId, userName},
  # requestParameters, responseElements, errorCode, errorMessage
  # to_string() sans `!` : retourne null sur champ absent au lieu de panic (events CloudTrail incomplets)
  event_name = to_string(.eventName) ?? ""
  event_source = to_string(.eventSource) ?? ""
  valid = event_name != ""

  if valid {
    # Timestamp : ISO 8601
    ts_str = to_string(.eventTime) ?? ""
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
    ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    # Error = failure (exists() obligatoire car to_string(null) == "" en VRL)
    error_code = if exists(.errorCode) { to_string(.errorCode) ?? null } else { null }
    error_msg  = if exists(.errorMessage) { to_string(.errorMessage) ?? null } else { null }
    is_error = error_code != null

    ocsf_severity = if is_error { 3 } else { 1 }
    status = if is_error { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
    status_id = if is_error { 2 } else { 1 }

    # User identity (peut manquer pour AWSService / AssumedRole partiel)
    user_identity = object(.userIdentity) ?? {}
    user_type = to_string(user_identity.type) ?? null
    user_arn = to_string(user_identity.arn) ?? null
    user_name = to_string(user_identity.userName) ?? null
    account_id = to_string(user_identity.accountId) ?? null

    # Service name from eventSource (e.g. "ec2.amazonaws.com" → "ec2")
    service_name = replace(event_source, r'\.amazonaws\.com$', "")

    # API Activity activity_id from the eventName verb (Create/Read/Update/Delete/Other).
    # Pre-computed: no inline `if` is allowed inside an object literal.
    activity_id = 99
    if starts_with(event_name, "Create") || starts_with(event_name, "Add") {
      activity_id = 1
    } else if starts_with(event_name, "Get") || starts_with(event_name, "List") || starts_with(event_name, "Read") {
      activity_id = 2
    } else if starts_with(event_name, "Update") || starts_with(event_name, "Set") || starts_with(event_name, "Modify") {
      activity_id = 3
    } else if starts_with(event_name, "Delete") || starts_with(event_name, "Remove") {
      activity_id = 4
    }

    .class_uid    = 6003
    .category_uid = 6
    .activity_id  = activity_id
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .time         = ts
    .status       = status
    .status_id    = status_id

    .api = {
      "operation": event_name,
      "service": {
        "name": service_name
      },
      "request": {
        "uid": to_string(.requestID) ?? null
      },
      "response": {
        "error":         error_code,
        "error_message": error_msg
      }
    }

    .actor = {
      "user": {
        "name":       user_name,
        "uid":        user_arn,
        "account_uid": account_id,
        "type":       user_type
      }
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip": to_string(.sourceIPAddress) ?? null
    }

    .http_request = {
      "user_agent": to_string(.userAgent) ?? null
    }

    .cloud = {
      "provider": "AWS",
      "region":   to_string(.awsRegion) ?? null,
      "account_uid": account_id
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "CloudTrail",
        "vendor_name": "AWS"
      },
      "version": to_string(.eventVersion) ?? null,
      "uid":     to_string(.eventID) ?? null
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "event_type":          to_string(.eventType) ?? null,
      "event_category":      to_string(.eventCategory) ?? null,
      "management_event":    .managementEvent,
      "read_only":           .readOnly,
      "recipient_account_id": to_string(.recipientAccountId) ?? null
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.eventVersion)
  del(.eventTime)
  del(.eventSource)
  del(.eventName)
  del(.awsRegion)
  del(.sourceIPAddress)
  del(.userAgent)
  del(.userIdentity)
  del(.requestParameters)
  del(.responseElements)
  del(.errorCode)
  del(.errorMessage)
  del(.requestID)
  del(.eventID)
  del(.eventType)
  del(.eventCategory)
  del(.managementEvent)
  del(.readOnly)
  del(.recipientAccountId)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER ---
[transforms.cloudtrail_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["cloudtrail_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 6003'

[transforms.cloudtrail_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["cloudtrail_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 6003'

[transforms.cloudtrail_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["cloudtrail_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "cloud/aws-cloudtrail",
    "parser":        "cloudtrail",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "cloudtrail_event_name_missing",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ---
[sinks.cloudtrail_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["cloudtrail_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-audit/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.cloudtrail_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.cloudtrail_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["cloudtrail_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.cloudtrail_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les audit events du `kube-apiserver` (JSON, API `audit.k8s.io/v1`). Normalise en OCSF classe 6003 (API Activity).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Kubernetes Audit Log — JSON (audit.k8s.io/v1)
# OCSF Class : 6003 (API Activity)
# Input      : File (JSON per line, kube-apiserver --audit-log-path)
# Tested with: Kubernetes 1.28 - 1.31, audit policy level >= Metadata
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.k8s_audit_input]
type    = "file"
include = ["${K8S_AUDIT_LOG:-/var/log/kubernetes/audit.log}"]

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.k8s_audit_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["k8s_audit_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = string!(.message)
  event = parse_json(raw_msg) ?? null
  valid = is_object(event) && (to_string(get(object!(event), ["kind"]) ?? "") ?? "") == "Event"

  if valid {
    ev = object!(event)

    # Helpers : null si champ absent ou string vide (OCSF preferre null a "")
    verb_raw = get(ev, ["verb"]) ?? null
    verb = if verb_raw != null { to_string(verb_raw) ?? "" } else { "" }

    uri_raw = get(ev, ["requestURI"]) ?? null
    request_uri = if uri_raw != null { to_string(uri_raw) ?? "" } else { "" }

    aid_raw = get(ev, ["auditID"]) ?? null
    audit_id = if aid_raw != null { s = to_string(aid_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    stage_raw = get(ev, ["stage"]) ?? null
    stage = if stage_raw != null { s = to_string(stage_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    level_raw = get(ev, ["level"]) ?? null
    level = if level_raw != null { s = to_string(level_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    ua_raw = get(ev, ["userAgent"]) ?? null
    user_agent_str = if ua_raw != null { s = to_string(ua_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # User identity
    user_obj = object(get(ev, ["user"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    un_raw = get(user_obj, ["username"]) ?? null
    user_name = if un_raw != null { s = to_string(un_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    uu_raw = get(user_obj, ["uid"]) ?? null
    user_uid = if uu_raw != null { s = to_string(uu_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # Source IPs (array) : on prend la 1ere
    source_ips = array(get(ev, ["sourceIPs"]) ?? []) ?? []
    src_ip = if length(source_ips) > 0 { s = to_string(source_ips[0]) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # objectRef : cible de l'operation
    obj_ref = object(get(ev, ["objectRef"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    tr_raw = get(obj_ref, ["resource"]) ?? null
    target_resource = if tr_raw != null { s = to_string(tr_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    tn_raw = get(obj_ref, ["namespace"]) ?? null
    target_namespace = if tn_raw != null { s = to_string(tn_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    tname_raw = get(obj_ref, ["name"]) ?? null
    target_name = if tname_raw != null { s = to_string(tname_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    tg_raw = get(obj_ref, ["apiGroup"]) ?? null
    target_api_group = if tg_raw != null { s = to_string(tg_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }
    tv_raw = get(obj_ref, ["apiVersion"]) ?? null
    target_api_version = if tv_raw != null { s = to_string(tv_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # responseStatus : code + message
    resp = object(get(ev, ["responseStatus"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    resp_code = to_int(get(resp, ["code"]) ?? 0) ?? 0
    rr_raw = get(resp, ["reason"]) ?? null
    resp_reason = if rr_raw != null { s = to_string(rr_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    # annotations (authorization decision)
    annotations = object(get(ev, ["annotations"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    az_raw = get(annotations, ["authorization.k8s.io/decision"]) ?? null
    authz_decision = if az_raw != null { s = to_string(az_raw) ?? ""; if s != "" { s } else { null } } else { null }

    is_failure = resp_code >= 400
    status = if is_failure { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
    status_id = if is_failure { 2 } else { 1 }
    ocsf_severity = if resp_code >= 500 { 4 } else if resp_code >= 400 { 3 } else { 1 }

    # activity_id OCSF : Create=1, Read=2, Update=3, Delete=4, Other=99
    activity_id = if verb == "create" || verb == "post" { 1 } else if verb == "get" || verb == "list" || verb == "watch" { 2 } else if verb == "update" || verb == "patch" || verb == "put" { 3 } else if verb == "delete" || verb == "deletecollection" { 4 } else { 99 }

    # Timestamp : stageTimestamp priorise (fin de requete)
    ts_str_raw = to_string(get(ev, ["stageTimestamp"]) ?? "") ?? ""
    if ts_str_raw == "" {
      ts_str_raw = to_string(get(ev, ["requestReceivedTimestamp"]) ?? "") ?? ""
    }
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str_raw, format: "%+") ?? null
    ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    .class_uid    = 6003
    .category_uid = 6
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .activity_id  = activity_id
    .time         = ts
    .status       = status
    .status_id    = status_id

    .api = {
      "operation": verb,
      "service": { "name": "kube-apiserver" },
      "request":  { "uid": audit_id, "uri": request_uri },
      "response": { "code": resp_code, "message": resp_reason }
    }

    .actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": user_name,
        "uid":  user_uid
      }
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip": src_ip
    }

    .http_request = {
      "user_agent": user_agent_str
    }

    .resources = [{
      "type":      target_resource,
      "name":      target_name,
      "namespace": target_namespace,
      "group":     target_api_group,
      "version":   target_api_version
    }]

    .cloud = {
      "provider": "Kubernetes"
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Kubernetes",
        "vendor_name": "CNCF"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     audit_id
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "audit_stage":           stage,
      "audit_level":           level,
      "authorization_decision": authz_decision
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()

  del(.message)
  del(.file)
  del(.host)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop malformed ---
[transforms.k8s_audit_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["k8s_audit_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 6003'

[transforms.k8s_audit_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["k8s_audit_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 6003'

# --- TRANSFORM : extraction des echecs pour raw-logs ---
[transforms.k8s_audit_raw_only]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["k8s_audit_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "cloud/kubernetes-audit",
    "parser":        "k8s_audit",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "kubernetes_audit_json_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit OCSF ---
[sinks.k8s_audit_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["k8s_audit_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-k8s/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.k8s_audit_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs ---
[sinks.k8s_audit_quickwit_raw]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["k8s_audit_raw_only"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.k8s_audit_quickwit_raw.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Normalise les evenements Microsoft 365 Unified Audit vers OCSF 6003 API Activity.
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Microsoft 365 Unified Audit — Management Activity API
# OCSF Class : 6003 (API Activity)
# Input      : HTTP push — POST NDJSON sur ${LISTEN_PORT:-8517}
#              Le fetcher poste chaque event JSON sur une ligne distincte.
# ==============================================================================

[sources.microsoft365_audit_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8517}"
encoding = "json"

[transforms.microsoft365_audit_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["microsoft365_audit_input"]
source = '''
  tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  raw_msg       = encode_json(.)

  operation = to_string(.Operation) ?? null
  workload   = to_string(.Workload)  ?? null
  valid = operation != null && operation != "" && workload != null && workload != ""

  ts_str    = to_string(.CreationTime) ?? null
  parsed_ts = if ts_str != null {
    parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") ?? null
  } else { null }
  ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

  result     = to_string(.ResultStatus) ?? null
  result_lc  = if result != null { downcase!(result) } else { "" }
  is_failure = result_lc != "" && result_lc != "succeeded" && result_lc != "success" && result_lc != "true"

  user_name = to_string(.UserId)   ?? null
  user_uid  = to_string(.UserKey)  ?? null
  user_type = to_string(.UserType) ?? null
  client_ip = to_string(.ClientIP) ?? null
  event_uid = to_string(.Id)       ?? null

  ocsf_unmapped = {
    "record_type":        .RecordType,
    "object_id":          to_string(.ObjectId)         ?? null,
    "organization_id":    to_string(.OrganizationId)   ?? null,
    "client_info_string": to_string(.ClientInfoString) ?? null,
    "external_access":    .ExternalAccess,
    "user_agent":         to_string(.UserAgent)        ?? null
  }

  # API Activity activity_id from the Operation verb (Create/Read/Update/Delete/Other).
  # Pre-computed: no inline `if` is allowed inside an object literal.
  operation_str = to_string(.Operation) ?? ""
  activity_id = 99
  if starts_with(operation_str, "Create") || starts_with(operation_str, "Add") {
    activity_id = 1
  } else if starts_with(operation_str, "Get") || starts_with(operation_str, "List") || starts_with(operation_str, "Read") {
    activity_id = 2
  } else if starts_with(operation_str, "Update") || starts_with(operation_str, "Set") || starts_with(operation_str, "Modify") {
    activity_id = 3
  } else if starts_with(operation_str, "Delete") || starts_with(operation_str, "Remove") {
    activity_id = 4
  }

  class_uid    = if valid { 6003 } else { 0 }
  category_uid = if valid { 6 } else { 0 }
  severity_id  = if !valid { 0 } else if is_failure { 3 } else { 1 }
  status       = if is_failure { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
  status_id    = if is_failure { 2 } else { 1 }

  . = {
    "class_uid":    class_uid,
    "category_uid": category_uid,
    "activity_id":  activity_id,
    "severity_id":  severity_id,
    "time":         ts,
    "status":       status,
    "status_id":    status_id,
    "api": {
      "operation": operation,
      "service":   { "name": workload },
      "response":  { "error_message": result }
    },
    "actor": {
      "user": {
        "name": user_name,
        "uid":  user_uid,
        "type": user_type
      }
    },
    "src_endpoint":  { "ip": client_ip },
    "metadata": {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Microsoft 365 Unified Audit",
        "vendor_name": "Microsoft"
      },
      "version":      "1.0.0",
      "uid":          event_uid,
      "log_provider": workload
    },
    "unmapped":      ocsf_unmapped,
    "tenant_id":     tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": datasource_id,
    "received_time": received_time,
    "raw":           raw_msg,
    "uid":           uuid_v4()
  }
'''

[transforms.microsoft365_audit_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["microsoft365_audit_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 6003'

[transforms.microsoft365_audit_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["microsoft365_audit_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 6003'

[transforms.microsoft365_audit_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["microsoft365_audit_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "cloud/microsoft-365-audit",
    "parser":        "microsoft-365-audit",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "microsoft365_audit_required_fields_missing",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

[sinks.microsoft365_audit_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft365_audit_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-audit/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft365_audit_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.microsoft365_audit_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft365_audit_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft365_audit_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Ingests CrowdSec alerts pushed as JSON by the `http` notification plugin. Normalises into OCSF class 2001 (Security Finding), routed to the `ocsf-endpoint` index.
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# CrowdSec — alerts via HTTP notification plugin
# OCSF Class : 2001 (Security Finding)
# Input      : HTTP (JSON)
# Tested with: CrowdSec 1.6 http notification plugin payloads
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.crowdsec_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8520}"
encoding = "json"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.crowdsec_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["crowdsec_input"]
source = '''
  raw_msg = encode_json(.)

  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # CrowdSec alert JSON structure :
  # scenario, scenario_hash, scenario_version, message, events_count,
  # source.{scope, value, ip, cn, as_name, latitude}, remediation,
  # decisions[].{type, scope, value, duration, origin, scenario}, start_at, stop_at
  # to_string() without `!` : returns null on missing field instead of panic
  # (CrowdSec sends alerts with no decision when remediation is disabled).
  scenario = to_string(.scenario) ?? ""
  valid = scenario != ""

  if valid {
    # Timestamp : ISO 8601 from start_at, fallback to now()
    ts_str = to_string(.start_at) ?? ""
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
    ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    # Decisions drive remediation severity. A ban/captcha is an active block (High).
    decisions = array(.decisions) ?? []
    has_blocking_decision = false
    for_each(decisions) -> |_index, decision| {
      decision_type = downcase(to_string(get(decision, ["type"]) ?? "") ?? "")
      if decision_type == "ban" || decision_type == "captcha" {
        has_blocking_decision = true
      }
    }

    remediation_active = .remediation == true

    # Pre-computed: no inline `if` is allowed inside an object literal.
    ocsf_severity = 2
    if has_blocking_decision {
      ocsf_severity = 4
    } else if remediation_active {
      ocsf_severity = 3
    }

    # Security Finding : a CrowdSec alert is a generated finding -> 1 (Generate).
    activity_id = 1

    events_count_raw = .events_count
    events_count = if events_count_raw != null { to_int(events_count_raw) ?? null } else { null }

    # string() (no `to_`) errors on null, so `?? null` yields a genuine null
    # for absent fields. to_string(null) would return "" instead.
    src = object(.source) ?? {}
    src_ip = string(get(src, ["ip"]) ?? null) ?? null
    src_scope = string(get(src, ["scope"]) ?? null) ?? null
    src_value = string(get(src, ["value"]) ?? null) ?? null
    src_cn = string(get(src, ["cn"]) ?? null) ?? null
    src_as_name = string(get(src, ["as_name"]) ?? null) ?? null

    first_decision = object(get(decisions, [0]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    decision_type = string(get(first_decision, ["type"]) ?? null) ?? null
    decision_duration = string(get(first_decision, ["duration"]) ?? null) ?? null
    decision_origin = string(get(first_decision, ["origin"]) ?? null) ?? null

    .class_uid    = 2001
    .category_uid = 2
    .activity_id  = activity_id
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .time         = ts

    scenario_hash = string(.scenario_hash) ?? null
    message_text = string(.message) ?? null
    scenario_version = string(.scenario_version) ?? null
    stop_at = string(.stop_at) ?? null

    .finding_info = {
      "title": scenario,
      "uid":   scenario_hash,
      "desc":  message_text
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip": src_ip,
      "location": {
        "country": src_cn,
        "isp":     src_as_name
      }
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "CrowdSec",
        "vendor_name": "CrowdSec"
      },
      "version":      scenario_version,
      "log_provider": "crowdsec-notification"
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "scenario":          scenario,
      "events_count":      events_count,
      "remediation":       .remediation,
      "source_scope":      src_scope,
      "source_value":      src_value,
      "decision_type":     decision_type,
      "decision_duration": decision_duration,
      "decision_origin":   decision_origin,
      "stop_at":           stop_at
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()

  del(.scenario)
  del(.scenario_hash)
  del(.scenario_version)
  del(.message)
  del(.events_count)
  del(.source)
  del(.remediation)
  del(.decisions)
  del(.start_at)
  del(.stop_at)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER ---
[transforms.crowdsec_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["crowdsec_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 2001'

[transforms.crowdsec_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["crowdsec_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 2001'

[transforms.crowdsec_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["crowdsec_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "endpoint/crowdsec",
    "parser":        "crowdsec",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "crowdsec_scenario_missing",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit OCSF ---
[sinks.crowdsec_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["crowdsec_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-endpoint/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.crowdsec_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.crowdsec_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["crowdsec_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.crowdsec_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les events CrowdStrike Falcon via le SIEM Connector (JSON syslog). Normalise en OCSF selon le type d'event : - DetectionSummaryEvent → classe 2001 (Security Finding) - ProcessRollup2 → classe 1007 (Process Activity) - NetworkDetection → classe 4001 (Network Activity)
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# CrowdStrike Falcon — JSON syslog (Streaming API / SIEM Connector)
# OCSF Class : 1007 (Process Activity) / 4001 (Network Activity) / 2001 (Detection)
# Input      : Syslog TCP (JSON payload)
# Tested with: CrowdStrike Falcon SIEM Connector, Streaming API v2
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.crowdstrike_input]
type    = "syslog"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-1514}"
mode    = "tcp"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.crowdstrike_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["crowdstrike_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = to_string(.message) ?? ""

  # CrowdStrike envoie du JSON dans le champ message syslog
  event = parse_json(raw_msg) ?? {}
  valid = exists(event.metadata)

  if valid {
    meta = object(event.metadata) ?? {}
    event_type = to_string(meta.eventType) ?? ""

    # Classification
    # DetectionSummaryEvent → 2001 (Security Finding)
    # ProcessRollup2 → 1007 (Process Activity)
    # NetworkContainmentEvent / NetworkDetection → 4001 (Network)
    # default → 2001
    is_process = event_type == "ProcessRollup2" || event_type == "SyntheticProcessRollup2"
    is_network = event_type == "NetworkContainmentEvent" || event_type == "NetworkDetection"

    class_uid = if is_process { 1007 } else if is_network { 4001 } else { 2001 }
    category_uid = if is_network { 4 } else if is_process { 1 } else { 2 }

    # activity_id (mandatory per D1) — D6 enums per class:
    # Process Activity 1007 → 1 Launch (ProcessRollup2 is a process-create event)
    # Network Activity 4001 → 6 Traffic
    # Security Finding 2001 → 1 (default per D1 when exact enum is unknown)
    activity_id = if is_process { 1 } else if is_network { 6 } else { 1 }

    # Severity : CrowdStrike SeverityName → OCSF severity_id
    cs_severity_name = to_string(event.SeverityName) ?? ""
    ocsf_severity = if cs_severity_name == "Critical" { 5 } else if cs_severity_name == "High" { 4 } else if cs_severity_name == "Medium" { 3 } else if cs_severity_name == "Low" { 2 } else { 1 }

    # Timestamp — explicit null checks (to_int(null)=0 is infallible, a ??
    # chain never fires and yields time=0). eventCreationTime is epoch ms,
    # ProcessStartTime is epoch seconds.
    ts = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
    if meta.eventCreationTime != null {
      ts = to_int(meta.eventCreationTime) ?? ts
    } else if event.ProcessStartTime != null {
      start_s = to_int(event.ProcessStartTime) ?? 0
      if start_s > 0 { ts = start_s * 1000 }
    }

    .class_uid    = class_uid
    .category_uid = category_uid
    .activity_id  = activity_id
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .time         = ts

    # Use explicit null checks — to_int(null)=0 and to_string(null)="" are infallible,
    # so the ?? fallback never fires when the field is missing.
    proc_name = if event.FileName != null { to_string(event.FileName) ?? null } else if event.ImageFileName != null { to_string(event.ImageFileName) ?? null } else { null }
    proc_pid = if event.TargetProcessId != null { to_int(event.TargetProcessId) ?? null } else if event.ProcessId != null { to_int(event.ProcessId) ?? null } else { null }
    actor_pid = if event.ParentProcessId != null { to_int(event.ParentProcessId) ?? null } else { null }

    .actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": to_string(event.UserName) ?? null
      },
      "process": {
        "pid":      actor_pid,
        "name":     to_string(event.ParentImageFileName) ?? null,
        "cmd_line": to_string(event.ParentCommandLine) ?? null
      }
    }

    .process = {
      "pid":      proc_pid,
      "name":     proc_name,
      "cmd_line": to_string(event.CommandLine) ?? null,
      "file": {
        "hashes": [
          { "algorithm": "SHA256", "value": to_string(event.SHA256String) ?? null }
        ]
      }
    }

    # Explicit cascade — to_string(null)="" is infallible, so `?? to_string(y)`
    # is dead. Pre-compute (never put `if` inside the object literal).
    src_ip = if event.LocalIP != null { to_string(event.LocalIP) ?? null } else if event.aip != null { to_string(event.aip) ?? null } else { null }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip":       src_ip,
      "hostname": to_string(event.ComputerName) ?? null
    }

    .dst_endpoint = {
      "ip":   to_string(event.RemoteIP) ?? null,
      "port": to_int(event.RemotePort) ?? null
    }

    # MITRE: TechniqueId is the code (T1003), Technique the human name.
    analytic_uid  = if event.TechniqueId != null { to_string(event.TechniqueId) ?? null } else { null }
    analytic_name = if event.Technique != null { to_string(event.Technique) ?? null } else { null }

    # Explicit cascade — to_string(null)="" is infallible, the `?? to_string(y)`
    # branch is dead. Pre-compute (never put `if` inside the object literal).
    finding_title = if event.DetectName != null { to_string(event.DetectName) ?? null } else if event.DetectDescription != null { to_string(event.DetectDescription) ?? null } else { null }
    finding_uid = if event.DetectId != null { to_string(event.DetectId) ?? null } else if meta.eventId != null { to_string(meta.eventId) ?? null } else { null }

    .finding_info = {
      "title":    finding_title,
      "uid":      finding_uid,
      "types":    [to_string(event.Tactic) ?? ""],
      "analytic": {
        "uid":  analytic_uid,
        "name": analytic_name
      }
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "CrowdStrike Falcon",
        "vendor_name": "CrowdStrike"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     to_string(meta.eventId) ?? null
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "event_type":   event_type,
      "customer_id":  to_string(meta.customerIDString) ?? null,
      "falcon_host_link": to_string(event.FalconHostLink) ?? null
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = del(.message)
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.timestamp)
  del(.hostname)
  del(.appname)
  del(.facility)
  del(.severity)
  del(.procid)
  del(.msgid)
  del(.version)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER ---
[transforms.crowdstrike_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["crowdstrike_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 0'

[transforms.crowdstrike_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["crowdstrike_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 0'

[transforms.crowdstrike_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["crowdstrike_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  # A runtime abort in the normalize transform forwards the ORIGINAL event here
  # (drop_on_error defaults to false): every field must be re-derived locally.
  raw_val = .raw
  if raw_val == null { raw_val = .message }
  if raw_val == null { raw_val = encode_json(.) }
  now_ms = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  uid_val = .uid
  if uid_val == null { uid_val = uuid_v4() }
  time_val = .time
  if time_val == null { time_val = now_ms }
  received_val = .received_time
  if received_val == null { received_val = now_ms }
  . = {
    "uid":           uid_val,
    "time":          time_val,
    "received_time": received_val,
    "tenant_id":     "${TENANT_ID}",
    "datasource_id": "${DATASOURCE_ID}",
    "source_type":   "endpoint/crowdstrike-falcon",
    "parser":        "crowdstrike-falcon",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "crowdstrike_metadata_missing",
    "raw":           raw_val
  }
'''

# --- ROUTE : dispatch par class_uid ---
# 1007 ProcessRollup2 + 2001 DetectionSummary → ocsf-endpoint
# 4001 NetworkDetection/NetworkContainment → ocsf-network
[transforms.crowdstrike_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["crowdstrike_filter_valid"]
route.endpoint = '.class_uid == 1001 || .class_uid == 1007 || .class_uid == 2001'
route.network  = '.class_uid == 4001'

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-endpoint ---
[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_endpoint]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["crowdstrike_route_by_class.endpoint"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-endpoint/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_endpoint.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-network ---
[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_network]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["crowdstrike_route_by_class.network"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-network/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_network.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["crowdstrike_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.crowdstrike_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collects Falco runtime-security alerts (JSON), pushed over HTTP by falcosidekick. Normalises to OCSF class 2001 (Security Finding), routed to the `ocsf-endpoint` index.
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Falco — runtime security alerts (JSON over HTTP, via falcosidekick)
# OCSF Class : 2001 (Security Finding)
# Input      : HTTP (JSON)
# Tested with: Falco JSON output, falcosidekick HTTP output
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.falco_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8519}"
encoding = "json"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.falco_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["falco_input"]
source = '''
  raw_msg = encode_json(.)

  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # Falco JSON structure :
  # output, priority, rule, time, output_fields{...}, source, tags[], hostname
  # to_string() sans `!` : retourne null sur champ absent au lieu de panic.
  rule_name = to_string(.rule) ?? ""
  valid = rule_name != ""

  if valid {
    # Timestamp : RFC3339 nanoseconds (e.g. 2024-04-14T10:23:45.123456789Z).
    # to_unix_timestamp! on null aborts, so pre-compute and guard with a null check.
    ts_str = to_string(.time) ?? ""
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
    ts = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
    if parsed_ts != null {
      ts = to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds")
    }

    # severity_id from the Falco priority (D6 enum).
    # Pre-computed: never put an `if` inside an object literal.
    priority = downcase(to_string(.priority) ?? "")
    severity_id = 1
    if priority == "emergency" || priority == "alert" || priority == "critical" {
      severity_id = 5
    } else if priority == "error" {
      severity_id = 4
    } else if priority == "warning" {
      severity_id = 3
    } else if priority == "notice" {
      severity_id = 2
    } else if priority == "informational" || priority == "info" || priority == "debug" {
      severity_id = 1
    }

    # Security Finding (2001) — D6 defines no stable activity_id enum for this
    # class; 1 (Generate) is the only lifecycle value that fits a fired alert.
    activity_id = 1

    # Falco tags -> finding_info.types (array of strings).
    finding_types = array(.tags) ?? []

    # output_fields : raw runtime context returned by Falco.
    output_fields = object(.output_fields) ?? {}

    # to_string(null)="" is infallible, so the ?? null fallback is dead on a
    # missing field. Guard explicitly so an absent hostname stays null.
    hostname = if .hostname != null { to_string(.hostname) ?? null } else { null }
    output_desc = if .output != null { to_string(.output) ?? null } else { null }
    priority_raw = if .priority != null { to_string(.priority) ?? null } else { null }
    source_raw = if .source != null { to_string(.source) ?? null } else { null }

    .class_uid    = 2001
    .category_uid = 2
    .activity_id  = activity_id
    .severity_id  = severity_id
    .time         = ts

    .finding_info = {
      "title":   rule_name,
      "types":   finding_types,
      "desc":    output_desc
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "hostname": hostname
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Falco",
        "vendor_name": "Falcosecurity"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0"
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "priority":      priority_raw,
      "source":        source_raw,
      "output_fields": output_fields
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.output)
  del(.priority)
  del(.rule)
  del(.output_fields)
  del(.source)
  del(.tags)
  del(.hostname)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER ---
[transforms.falco_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["falco_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 2001'

[transforms.falco_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["falco_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 2001'

[transforms.falco_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["falco_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "endpoint/falco",
    "parser":        "falco",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "falco_rule_missing",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-endpoint ---
[sinks.falco_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["falco_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-endpoint/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.falco_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.falco_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["falco_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.falco_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Ingests Microsoft Defender for Endpoint alerts and events delivered through the streaming API (Event Hub or HTTP forwarder) as JSON. Each event is normalised to OCSF **Security Finding** (class 2001, category 2) and routed to the `ocsf-endpoint` index. Events without a `Title` are not alerts and are routed to `raw-logs` with `parse_status = "failed"`.
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Microsoft Defender for Endpoint — alerts/events (Streaming API, JSON)
# OCSF Class : 2001 (Security Finding)
# Input      : HTTP (JSON) — Event Hub / HTTP forwarder push
# Tested with: Advanced Hunting schema (AlertEvidence / DeviceEvents)
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.defender_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8521}"
encoding = "json"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.defender_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["defender_input"]
source = '''
  # JSON source already decoded by Vector: capture raw before mutation.
  raw_msg = encode_json(.)

  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # Defender Advanced Hunting fields (AlertEvidence / DeviceEvents) :
  # Timestamp, DeviceId, DeviceName, AlertId, Title, Severity, Category,
  # FileName, FolderPath, ProcessCommandLine, AccountName, AccountDomain,
  # InitiatingProcessFileName, RemoteIP
  # A Defender alert always carries a Title. Its absence = not an alert event.
  title = to_string(.Title) ?? ""
  valid = title != ""

  if valid {
    # Timestamp : ISO 8601 with 7-digit fractional seconds (e.g. ...1234567Z).
    # %+ parses RFC3339; fall back to now() if absent or malformed.
    ts_str = to_string(.Timestamp) ?? ""
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
    ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    # Severity (string) → OCSF severity_id.
    # Informational→1, Low→2, Medium→3, High→4, Critical→5, else 1.
    severity_name = to_string(.Severity) ?? ""
    ocsf_severity = 1
    if severity_name == "Critical" {
      ocsf_severity = 5
    } else if severity_name == "High" {
      ocsf_severity = 4
    } else if severity_name == "Medium" {
      ocsf_severity = 3
    } else if severity_name == "Low" {
      ocsf_severity = 2
    } else if severity_name == "Informational" {
      ocsf_severity = 1
    }

    .class_uid    = 2001
    .category_uid = 2
    .activity_id  = 1
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .time         = ts

    # to_string(null)="" is infallible, so a bare `to_string(.X) ?? null` on an
    # absent field yields "" (never null). Guard every optional field with an
    # explicit `if .X != null` so a missing field stays null in the output.
    file_name        = if .FileName != null { to_string(.FileName) ?? null } else { null }
    folder_path      = if .FolderPath != null { to_string(.FolderPath) ?? null } else { null }
    process_cmd_line = if .ProcessCommandLine != null { to_string(.ProcessCommandLine) ?? null } else { null }
    initiating_name  = if .InitiatingProcessFileName != null { to_string(.InitiatingProcessFileName) ?? null } else { null }
    account_name     = if .AccountName != null { to_string(.AccountName) ?? null } else { null }
    account_domain   = if .AccountDomain != null { to_string(.AccountDomain) ?? null } else { null }
    device_uid       = if .DeviceId != null { to_string(.DeviceId) ?? null } else { null }
    device_hostname  = if .DeviceName != null { to_string(.DeviceName) ?? null } else { null }
    alert_id         = if .AlertId != null { to_string(.AlertId) ?? null } else { null }
    category         = if .Category != null { to_string(.Category) ?? null } else { null }

    # Process file name : FileName, else the initiating process.
    process_name = if file_name != null { file_name } else { initiating_name }

    .process = {
      "name":     process_name,
      "cmd_line": process_cmd_line,
      "file": {
        "name": file_name,
        "path": folder_path
      }
    }

    .actor = {
      "user": {
        "name":   account_name,
        "domain": account_domain
      },
      "process": {
        "name": initiating_name
      }
    }

    .device = {
      "uid":      device_uid,
      "hostname": device_hostname
    }

    # RemoteIP is the external peer in a Defender event → destination endpoint.
    remote_ip = if .RemoteIP != null { to_string(.RemoteIP) ?? null } else { null }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "hostname": device_hostname
    }

    .dst_endpoint = {
      "ip": remote_ip
    }

    .finding_info = {
      "title": title,
      "uid":   alert_id,
      "types": [category]
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Microsoft Defender for Endpoint",
        "vendor_name": "Microsoft"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     alert_id
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "category": category
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.Timestamp)
  del(.DeviceId)
  del(.DeviceName)
  del(.AlertId)
  del(.Title)
  del(.Severity)
  del(.Category)
  del(.FileName)
  del(.FolderPath)
  del(.ProcessCommandLine)
  del(.AccountName)
  del(.AccountDomain)
  del(.InitiatingProcessFileName)
  del(.RemoteIP)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER ---
[transforms.defender_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["defender_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 2001'

[transforms.defender_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["defender_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 2001'

[transforms.defender_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["defender_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "endpoint/microsoft-defender-endpoint",
    "parser":        "microsoft-defender-endpoint",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "defender_title_missing",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ocsf-endpoint ---
[sinks.defender_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["defender_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-endpoint/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.defender_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.defender_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["defender_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.defender_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Normalise les activites de l'Admin SDK Reports API de Google Workspace. La classe OCSF est determinee au runtime selon `id.applicationName` :
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Google Workspace — Admin SDK Reports API activities
# OCSF Classes : 3002 (Authentication — login) · 3001 (Account Change — admin /
#                user_accounts / groups) · 6003 (API Activity — everything else)
# Input        : HTTP push — POST JSON on ${LISTEN_PORT:-8523}
#                A fetcher polls the Reports API and posts each activity object.
# ==============================================================================

[sources.google_workspace_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8523}"
encoding = "json"

[transforms.google_workspace_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["google_workspace_input"]
source = '''
  tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  raw_msg       = encode_json(.)

  id_obj           = object(.id) ?? {}
  application_name = to_string(get(id_obj, ["applicationName"]) ?? null) ?? null
  events           = array(.events) ?? []
  is_valid         = application_name != null && application_name != "" && length(events) > 0

  ocsf_class_uid    = 0
  ocsf_category_uid = 0
  ocsf_activity_id  = 0
  ocsf_severity_id  = 0
  ocsf_status       = "Unknown"
  ocsf_status_id    = 0
  ocsf_actor        = {}
  ocsf_src_endpoint = {}
  ocsf_metadata     = {}
  ocsf_unmapped     = {}
  ts                = received_time

  if is_valid {
    # id.time is RFC 3339 (e.g. 2024-04-14T10:23:45.123Z).
    time_str  = to_string(get(id_obj, ["time"]) ?? null) ?? ""
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(time_str, format: "%+") ?? null
    ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { received_time }

    # Reports API groups one or more events under a single activity. Map the
    # first event for name/type; the rest are preserved in unmapped.
    first_event   = object(get(events, [0]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    event_name    = to_string(get(first_event, ["name"]) ?? null) ?? null
    event_type    = to_string(get(first_event, ["type"]) ?? null) ?? null
    extra_events  = if length(events) > 1 { slice!(events, 1) } else { [] }

    actor_obj   = object(.actor) ?? {}
    actor_email = to_string(get(actor_obj, ["email"])     ?? null) ?? null
    actor_id    = to_string(get(actor_obj, ["profileId"]) ?? null) ?? null

    ocsf_actor = {
      "user": {
        "email_addr": actor_email,
        "name":       actor_email,
        "uid":        actor_id
      }
    }

    ocsf_src_endpoint = { "ip": to_string(.ipAddress) ?? null }

    ocsf_metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Google Workspace",
        "vendor_name": "Google"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     to_string(get(id_obj, ["uniqueQualifier"]) ?? null) ?? null
    }

    ocsf_unmapped = {
      "application_name": application_name,
      "event_name":       event_name,
      "event_type":       event_type,
      "customer_id":      to_string(get(id_obj, ["customerId"]) ?? null) ?? null,
      "extra_events":     extra_events
    }

    if application_name == "login" {
      # Authentication: activity from the event name, status from success/failure.
      login_activity_id = 99
      if event_name == "login_success" || event_name == "login" {
        login_activity_id = 1
      } else if event_name == "logout" {
        login_activity_id = 2
      }

      is_login_failure = event_name == "login_failure"

      ocsf_class_uid    = 3002
      ocsf_category_uid = 3
      ocsf_activity_id  = login_activity_id
      ocsf_severity_id  = if is_login_failure { 3 } else { 1 }
      ocsf_status       = if is_login_failure { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
      ocsf_status_id    = if is_login_failure { 2 } else { 1 }
    } else if application_name == "admin" || application_name == "user_accounts" || application_name == "groups" {
      # Account Change: the Reports API verbs are too varied to map reliably.
      ocsf_class_uid    = 3001
      ocsf_category_uid = 3
      ocsf_activity_id  = 99
      ocsf_severity_id  = 1
      ocsf_status       = "Success"
      ocsf_status_id    = 1
    } else {
      # API Activity for drive, token, calendar and every other application.
      verb = to_string(event_name)
      api_activity_id = 99
      if starts_with(verb, "create") || starts_with(verb, "add") {
        api_activity_id = 1
      } else if starts_with(verb, "view") || starts_with(verb, "download") || starts_with(verb, "list") {
        api_activity_id = 2
      } else if starts_with(verb, "edit") || starts_with(verb, "update") || starts_with(verb, "rename") {
        api_activity_id = 3
      } else if starts_with(verb, "delete") || starts_with(verb, "remove") {
        api_activity_id = 4
      }

      ocsf_class_uid    = 6003
      ocsf_category_uid = 6
      ocsf_activity_id  = api_activity_id
      ocsf_severity_id  = 1
      ocsf_status       = "Success"
      ocsf_status_id    = 1

      ocsf_metadata = set!(ocsf_metadata, ["product", "feature", "name"], application_name)
    }
  }

  . = {
    "class_uid":     ocsf_class_uid,
    "category_uid":  ocsf_category_uid,
    "activity_id":   ocsf_activity_id,
    "severity_id":   ocsf_severity_id,
    "time":          ts,
    "status":        ocsf_status,
    "status_id":     ocsf_status_id,
    "actor":         ocsf_actor,
    "src_endpoint":  ocsf_src_endpoint,
    "metadata":      ocsf_metadata,
    "unmapped":      ocsf_unmapped,
    "tenant_id":     tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": datasource_id,
    "received_time": received_time,
    "raw":           raw_msg,
    "uid":           uuid_v4()
  }
'''

[transforms.google_workspace_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["google_workspace_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 0'

[transforms.google_workspace_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["google_workspace_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 0'

[transforms.google_workspace_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["google_workspace_filter_valid"]
route.identity = '.class_uid == 3002 || .class_uid == 3001'
route.audit    = '.class_uid == 6003'

[transforms.google_workspace_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["google_workspace_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "identity/google-workspace",
    "parser":        "google-workspace",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "google_workspace_activity_shape_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

[sinks.google_workspace_quickwit_identity]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["google_workspace_route_by_class.identity"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-identity/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.google_workspace_quickwit_identity.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.google_workspace_quickwit_audit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["google_workspace_route_by_class.audit"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-audit/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.google_workspace_quickwit_audit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.google_workspace_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["google_workspace_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.google_workspace_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Normalise les logs Microsoft Graph Entra ID :
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Microsoft Entra ID — Graph API audit logs
# OCSF Classes : 3002 (Authentication — sign-in) · 6003 (API Activity — directory audit)
# Input        : HTTP push — POST NDJSON sur ${LISTEN_PORT:-8518}
#                Le fetcher poste chaque event JSON sur une ligne distincte.
# ==============================================================================

[sources.microsoft_entra_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8518}"
encoding = "json"

[transforms.microsoft_entra_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["microsoft_entra_input"]
source = '''
  tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  raw_msg       = encode_json(.)

  signin_time        = to_string(.createdDateTime)  ?? null
  audit_time         = to_string(.activityDateTime) ?? null
  is_signin          = signin_time != null && signin_time != ""
  is_directory_audit = audit_time != null && audit_time != ""

  ts_str    = if is_signin { signin_time } else { audit_time }
  parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
  ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

  ocsf_class_uid    = 0
  ocsf_category_uid = 0
  ocsf_activity_id  = 0
  ocsf_severity_id  = 0
  ocsf_status       = "Unknown"
  ocsf_status_id    = 0
  ocsf_actor        = {}
  ocsf_api          = null
  ocsf_app          = null
  ocsf_src_endpoint = {}
  ocsf_metadata     = {}
  ocsf_unmapped     = {}

  if is_signin {
    status_obj     = object(.status) ?? {}
    error_code     = to_int(get(status_obj, ["errorCode"]) ?? 0) ?? 0
    failure_reason = to_string(get(status_obj, ["failureReason"]) ?? null) ?? null
    is_failure     = error_code != 0

    ocsf_class_uid    = 3002
    ocsf_category_uid = 3
    ocsf_activity_id  = 1
    ocsf_severity_id  = if is_failure { 3 } else { 1 }
    ocsf_status       = if is_failure { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
    ocsf_status_id    = if is_failure { 2 } else { 1 }

    ocsf_actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": to_string(.userPrincipalName) ?? null,
        "uid":  to_string(.userId)            ?? null
      }
    }

    ocsf_app = {
      "name": to_string(.appDisplayName) ?? null,
      "uid":  to_string(.appId)          ?? null
    }

    ocsf_src_endpoint = { "ip": to_string(.ipAddress) ?? null }

    ocsf_metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Microsoft Entra ID",
        "vendor_name": "Microsoft"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     to_string(.id) ?? null
    }

    ocsf_unmapped = {
      "event_family":              "signIn",
      "conditional_access_status": to_string(.conditionalAccessStatus) ?? null,
      "failure_reason":            failure_reason,
      "risk_detail":               to_string(.riskDetail)              ?? null,
      "risk_level_aggregated":     to_string(.riskLevelAggregated)     ?? null,
      "sign_in_event_types":       .signInEventTypes,
      "resource_display_name":     to_string(.resourceDisplayName)     ?? null,
      "service_principal_id":      to_string(.servicePrincipalId)      ?? null,
      "client_app_used":           to_string(.clientAppUsed)           ?? null
    }
  } else if is_directory_audit {
    initiated_by   = object(.initiatedBy) ?? {}
    initiated_user = object(get(initiated_by, ["user"]) ?? {}) ?? {}
    initiated_app  = object(get(initiated_by, ["app"])  ?? {}) ?? {}
    result         = to_string(.result) ?? null
    is_failure     = result != null && result != "" && result != "success"

    # API Activity activity_id from the activityDisplayName verb.
    activity_display = to_string(.activityDisplayName) ?? ""
    audit_activity_id = 99
    if starts_with(activity_display, "Create") || starts_with(activity_display, "Add") {
      audit_activity_id = 1
    } else if starts_with(activity_display, "Get") || starts_with(activity_display, "List") || starts_with(activity_display, "Read") {
      audit_activity_id = 2
    } else if starts_with(activity_display, "Update") || starts_with(activity_display, "Set") || starts_with(activity_display, "Modify") {
      audit_activity_id = 3
    } else if starts_with(activity_display, "Delete") || starts_with(activity_display, "Remove") {
      audit_activity_id = 4
    }

    ocsf_class_uid    = 6003
    ocsf_category_uid = 6
    ocsf_activity_id  = audit_activity_id
    ocsf_severity_id  = if is_failure { 3 } else { 1 }
    ocsf_status       = if is_failure { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
    ocsf_status_id    = if is_failure { 2 } else { 1 }

    ocsf_api = {
      "operation": to_string(.activityDisplayName) ?? null,
      "service":   { "name": to_string(.category) ?? "Microsoft Entra ID" },
      "response":  { "error_message": to_string(.resultReason) ?? null }
    }

    ocsf_actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": to_string(get(initiated_user, ["userPrincipalName"]) ?? null) ?? null,
        "uid":  to_string(get(initiated_user, ["id"])                ?? null) ?? null
      },
      "app": {
        "name": to_string(get(initiated_app, ["displayName"]) ?? null) ?? null,
        "uid":  to_string(get(initiated_app, ["appId"])       ?? null) ?? null
      }
    }

    ocsf_metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Microsoft Entra ID",
        "vendor_name": "Microsoft"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "uid":     to_string(.id) ?? null
    }

    ocsf_unmapped = {
      "event_family":       "directoryAudit",
      "logged_by_service":  to_string(.loggedByService) ?? null,
      "target_resources":   .targetResources,
      "additional_details": .additionalDetails,
      "correlation_id":     to_string(.correlationId)   ?? null
    }
  }

  . = {
    "class_uid":     ocsf_class_uid,
    "category_uid":  ocsf_category_uid,
    "activity_id":   ocsf_activity_id,
    "severity_id":   ocsf_severity_id,
    "time":          ts,
    "status":        ocsf_status,
    "status_id":     ocsf_status_id,
    "actor":         ocsf_actor,
    "src_endpoint":  ocsf_src_endpoint,
    "metadata":      ocsf_metadata,
    "unmapped":      ocsf_unmapped,
    "tenant_id":     tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": datasource_id,
    "received_time": received_time,
    "raw":           raw_msg,
    "uid":           uuid_v4()
  }

  if ocsf_api != null {
    .api = ocsf_api
  }
  if ocsf_app != null {
    .app = ocsf_app
  }
'''

[transforms.microsoft_entra_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["microsoft_entra_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 0'

[transforms.microsoft_entra_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["microsoft_entra_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 0'

[transforms.microsoft_entra_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["microsoft_entra_filter_valid"]
route.identity = '.class_uid == 3002'
route.audit    = '.class_uid == 6003'

[transforms.microsoft_entra_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["microsoft_entra_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "identity/microsoft-entra",
    "parser":        "microsoft-entra",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "microsoft_entra_event_shape_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_identity]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft_entra_route_by_class.identity"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-identity/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_identity.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_audit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft_entra_route_by_class.audit"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-audit/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_audit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["microsoft_entra_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.microsoft_entra_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Normalises Okta System Log API events into OCSF. The collective routes by `eventType` prefix:
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Okta — System Log API events
# OCSF Classes : 3002 (Authentication — session/auth) · 3001 (Account Change —
#                lifecycle/group/account) · 6003 (API Activity — everything else)
# Input        : HTTP push — a System Log fetcher POSTs each LogEvent JSON on
#                ${LISTEN_PORT:-8522}.
# Tested with  : Okta System Log API v1 (LogEvent schema)
# ==============================================================================

[sources.okta_input]
type     = "http_server"
address  = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8522}"
encoding = "json"

[transforms.okta_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["okta_input"]
source = '''
  tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  raw_msg       = encode_json(.)

  event_type = to_string(.eventType) ?? ""
  is_valid   = event_type != ""

  # Timestamp: Okta `published` is ISO 8601 with milliseconds.
  ts_str    = to_string(.published) ?? ""
  parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
  ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { received_time }

  # Severity map (Okta severity → OCSF severity_id). Unknown → Informational.
  okta_severity = to_string(.severity) ?? ""
  severity_id = 1
  if okta_severity == "WARN" {
    severity_id = 3
  } else if okta_severity == "ERROR" {
    severity_id = 4
  }

  # Outcome → status_id / status (SUCCESS → 1, FAILURE → 2, unknown → 0).
  outcome_obj    = object(.outcome) ?? {}
  outcome_result = to_string(get(outcome_obj, ["result"]) ?? "") ?? ""
  status_id = 0
  status    = "Unknown"
  if outcome_result == "SUCCESS" {
    status_id = 1
    status    = "Success"
  } else if outcome_result == "FAILURE" {
    status_id = 2
    status    = "Failure"
  }

  # Actor → OCSF user (alternateId is the principal name, displayName the label).
  actor_obj = object(.actor) ?? {}
  actor_user = {
    "name": to_string(get(actor_obj, ["alternateId"]) ?? null) ?? null,
    "uid":  to_string(get(actor_obj, ["id"])          ?? null) ?? null,
    "full_name": to_string(get(actor_obj, ["displayName"]) ?? null) ?? null
  }

  # Client → src_endpoint.
  client_obj = object(.client) ?? {}
  src_ip     = to_string(get(client_obj, ["ipAddress"]) ?? null) ?? null

  # Routing classification by eventType prefix (D1 / D6 enums).
  ocsf_class_uid    = 0
  ocsf_category_uid = 0
  ocsf_activity_id  = 0

  if starts_with(event_type, "user.session.") || starts_with(event_type, "user.authentication.") {
    ocsf_class_uid    = 3002
    ocsf_category_uid = 3
    # Authentication activity_id: Logon (1) / Logoff (2) / Other (99).
    if event_type == "user.session.end" {
      ocsf_activity_id = 2
    } else if starts_with(event_type, "user.session.") || starts_with(event_type, "user.authentication.") {
      ocsf_activity_id = 1
    } else {
      ocsf_activity_id = 99
    }
  } else if starts_with(event_type, "user.lifecycle.") || starts_with(event_type, "group.") || starts_with(event_type, "user.account.") {
    ocsf_class_uid    = 3001
    ocsf_category_uid = 3
    # Account Change verbs are not deterministically derivable from the Okta
    # eventType string; default to Other.
    ocsf_activity_id  = 99
  } else if is_valid {
    ocsf_class_uid    = 6003
    ocsf_category_uid = 6
    # API Activity activity_id from the eventType verb (Create/Read/Update/Delete/Other).
    ocsf_activity_id  = 99
    if contains(event_type, ".create") || contains(event_type, ".add") {
      ocsf_activity_id = 1
    } else if contains(event_type, ".read") || contains(event_type, ".list") || contains(event_type, ".get") {
      ocsf_activity_id = 2
    } else if contains(event_type, ".update") || contains(event_type, ".set") {
      ocsf_activity_id = 3
    } else if contains(event_type, ".delete") || contains(event_type, ".remove") {
      ocsf_activity_id = 4
    }
  }

  ocsf_metadata = {
    "product": {
      "name":        "Okta",
      "vendor_name": "Okta"
    },
    "version": "1.0.0",
    "uid":     to_string(.uuid) ?? null
  }

  ocsf_unmapped = {
    "event_type":      event_type,
    "display_message": to_string(.displayMessage) ?? null,
    "outcome_reason":  to_string(get(outcome_obj, ["reason"]) ?? null) ?? null,
    "user_agent":      to_string(get(object(get(client_obj, ["userAgent"]) ?? {}) ?? {}, ["rawUserAgent"]) ?? null) ?? null,
    "geo":             get(client_obj, ["geographicalContext"]) ?? null,
    "target":          .target
  }

  . = {
    "class_uid":     ocsf_class_uid,
    "category_uid":  ocsf_category_uid,
    "activity_id":   ocsf_activity_id,
    "severity_id":   severity_id,
    "time":          ts,
    "status":        status,
    "status_id":     status_id,
    "actor":         { "user": actor_user },
    "src_endpoint":  { "ip": src_ip },
    "metadata":      ocsf_metadata,
    "unmapped":      ocsf_unmapped,
    "tenant_id":     tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": datasource_id,
    "received_time": received_time,
    "raw":           raw_msg,
    "uid":           uuid_v4()
  }
'''

[transforms.okta_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["okta_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 0'

[transforms.okta_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["okta_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 0'

[transforms.okta_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["okta_filter_valid"]
route.identity = '.class_uid == 3002 || .class_uid == 3001'
route.audit    = '.class_uid == 6003'

[transforms.okta_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["okta_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "identity/okta",
    "parser":        "okta",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "okta_event_type_missing",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

[sinks.okta_quickwit_identity]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["okta_route_by_class.identity"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-identity/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.okta_quickwit_identity.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.okta_quickwit_audit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["okta_route_by_class.audit"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-audit/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.okta_quickwit_audit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.okta_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["okta_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.okta_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les evenements de securite Windows via Winlogbeat (format JSON). Normalise en OCSF selon le type d'event : - 4624/4625/4634/4647/4648 → classe 3002 (Authentication) - 4720/4732 → classe 3001 (Account Change) - 4688/4698 → classe 1007 (Process Activity)
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Windows Security Event Log (EVTX) — via Winlogbeat JSON
# OCSF Class : 3002 (Authentication) / 3001 (Account Change) / 1007 (Process)
# Input      : HTTP (JSON from Winlogbeat/NXLog)
# Tested with: Windows Server 2019/2022, Winlogbeat 8.x
# Events     : 4624/4625/4634/4647/4648/4688/4698/4720/4732
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.winevtx_input]
type    = "http_server"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-8514}"
encoding = "json"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.winevtx_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["winevtx_input"]
source = '''
  raw_msg = encode_json(.)

  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  # Winlogbeat JSON structure: .winlog.event_id, .winlog.event_data.*,
  # .winlog.computer_name, .timestamp — NXLog ships the same fields at the
  # top level. Explicit null checks: to_int(null)=0 / to_string(null)=""
  # are infallible, so a ?? chain never reaches the NXLog fallback.
  event_id = 0
  if .winlog.event_id != null {
    event_id = to_int(.winlog.event_id) ?? 0
  } else if .event_id != null {
    event_id = to_int(.event_id) ?? 0
  }
  event_data = object(.winlog.event_data) ?? object(.event_data) ?? {}
  computer = "unknown"
  if .winlog.computer_name != null {
    computer = to_string(.winlog.computer_name) ?? "unknown"
  } else if .computer_name != null {
    computer = to_string(.computer_name) ?? "unknown"
  }

  # Timestamp
  ts_str = to_string(.timestamp) ?? null
  ts = if ts_str != null {
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
    if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }
  } else {
    to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  # Classification par Event ID (OCSF taxonomy — decree D1/D6)
  # 4624/4625/4634/4647/4648 = Authentication (3002, category 3)
  # 4720/4732 = Account Change (3001, category 3)
  # 4688 = New Process (1007 Process Activity, category 1)
  # 4698 = Scheduled Task (1007 Process Activity, category 1)
  is_auth = event_id == 4624 || event_id == 4625 || event_id == 4634 || event_id == 4647 || event_id == 4648
  is_account = event_id == 4720 || event_id == 4732
  is_process = event_id == 4688 || event_id == 4698

  class_uid = if is_auth { 3002 } else if is_account { 3001 } else if is_process { 1007 } else { 0 }
  category_uid = if is_process { 1 } else if is_auth || is_account { 3 } else { 0 }

  # Severity
  # 4625 (failed logon), 4648 (explicit creds) = medium
  # 4720 (user created), 4732 (member added to group) = low
  # 4688 (new process), 4698 (scheduled task) = info
  ocsf_severity = if event_id == 4625 { 3 } else if event_id == 4648 || event_id == 4720 || event_id == 4732 { 2 } else { 1 }

  # Status for auth events — "Other" maps to status_id 99, never 0 (decree D1)
  status = if event_id == 4624 || event_id == 4648 { "Success" } else if event_id == 4625 { "Failure" } else { "Other" }
  status_id = if event_id == 4624 || event_id == 4648 { 1 } else if event_id == 4625 { 2 } else { 99 }

  # activity_id (mandatory per decree D1) — class-aware, 99 when unmappable.
  # Authentication (3002): logon attempts 4624/4625/4648 -> 1 Logon (activity
  # is the action, status carries success/failure); 4634/4647 logoff -> 2.
  # Process (1007): 4688 launch -> 1. Account Change (3001) has no D6 activity
  # enum, so unmappable -> 99.
  activity_id = if is_auth {
    if event_id == 4624 || event_id == 4625 || event_id == 4648 { 1 } else if event_id == 4634 || event_id == 4647 { 2 } else { 99 }
  } else if is_process {
    if event_id == 4688 { 1 } else { 99 }
  } else {
    99
  }

  # User info
  target_user = to_string(event_data.TargetUserName) ?? null
  target_domain = to_string(event_data.TargetDomainName) ?? null
  subject_user = to_string(event_data.SubjectUserName) ?? null
  logon_type = to_int(event_data.LogonType) ?? null
  # Explicit null guards: `to_string(missing) ?? fallback` is dead (cast of a
  # missing field returns "", never errors), so the NewProcessName/ProcessName
  # and TargetUserSid/TargetSid fallbacks must branch on presence.
  process_name = if event_data.NewProcessName != null {
    to_string(event_data.NewProcessName) ?? null
  } else if event_data.ProcessName != null {
    to_string(event_data.ProcessName) ?? null
  } else {
    null
  }
