parsers.description: Collecte les requetes DNS resolvees par Unbound sur OPNsense, forwardees via syslog. Normalise en OCSF classe 4003 (DNS Activity), activity `Query`.
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Unbound DNS (OPNsense) — query log
# OCSF Class : 4003 (DNS Activity)
# Input      : Syslog TCP (forwarded from OPNsense)
# Tested with: OPNsense 24.x / Unbound 1.19.x (log-queries: yes, verbosity >= 1)
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.unbound_input]
type    = "syslog"
address = "0.0.0.0:${LISTEN_PORT:-5145}"
mode    = "tcp"

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + OCSF normalization ---
[transforms.unbound_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["unbound_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = string!(.message)

  # Unbound query log format (verbose info):
  #   [1713091425] unbound[12345:0] info: 10.0.0.5 example.com. A IN
  # OPNsense may also deliver the variant without prefix:
  #   info: 10.0.0.5 example.com. A IN
  # Match the tail: CLIENT_IP QNAME. QTYPE QCLASS
  parsed = parse_regex(raw_msg, r'(?P<client>(?:\d{1,3}\.){3}\d{1,3}|[0-9a-fA-F:]+)\s+(?P<qname>\S+?)\.?\s+(?P<qtype>[A-Z0-9]+)\s+(?P<qclass>[A-Z]+)\s*$') ?? {}

  client_ip = parsed.client
  valid = is_string(client_ip) && client_ip != ""

  if valid {
    # parse_regex groups are typed string when the capture succeeded
    qname_raw = to_string!(parsed.qname)
    # Strip the optional trailing dot (unbound canonical FQDN)
    qname = replace(qname_raw, r'\.$', "")
    qtype = to_string!(parsed.qtype)
    qclass = to_string!(parsed.qclass)

    ts = to_unix_timestamp(.timestamp, unit: "milliseconds") ?? to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

    .class_uid    = 4003
    .category_uid = 4
    .severity_id  = 1
    .activity_id  = 1
    .time         = ts

    .query = {
      "hostname": qname,
      "type":     qtype,
      "class":    qclass
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip": to_string!(parsed.client)
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Unbound",
        "vendor_name": "NLnet Labs"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0"
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  # Full raw line (syslog header + unbound payload) + unique identifier
  _ts   = to_string(.timestamp) ?? ""
  _host = string(.hostname)     ?? ""
  _app  = string(.appname)      ?? ""
  .raw  = _ts + " " + _host + " " + _app + ": " + raw_msg
  .uid  = uuid_v4()

  del(.message)
  del(.timestamp)
  del(.hostname)
  del(.appname)
  del(.facility)
  del(.severity)
  del(.procid)
  del(.msgid)
  del(.version)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop malformed ---
[transforms.unbound_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["unbound_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 4003'

[transforms.unbound_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["unbound_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 4003'

# --- TRANSFORM : extract failures for raw-logs ---
[transforms.unbound_raw_only]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["unbound_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "network/unbound",
    "parser":        "unbound",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "unbound_query_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit OCSF ---
[sinks.unbound_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["unbound_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-dns/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.unbound_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs ---
[sinks.unbound_quickwit_raw]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["unbound_raw_only"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.unbound_quickwit_raw.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collects Zeek network logs in JSON mode from a log directory and normalises them to OCSF. The log type is read from the `_path` field that Zeek writes on every JSON line, and the parser routes dynamically:
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Zeek — JSON logs (conn / dns / http / ssl)
# OCSF Classes: 4001 (Network), 4002 (HTTP), 4003 (DNS)
# Input       : File (JSON per line, Zeek json-streaming-* logs)
# Tested with : Zeek 6.x JSON-mode logs
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.zeek_input]
type    = "file"
include = ["${ZEEK_LOG_DIR:-/var/log/zeek}/*.log"]

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.zeek_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["zeek_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = string!(.message)
  parsed = parse_json(raw_msg) ?? null
  valid_json = is_object(parsed)

  if valid_json {
    ev = object!(parsed)

    # Zeek JSON-mode names each log type via `_path` (conn, dns, http, ssl).
    log_path = downcase(to_string(get(ev, ["_path"]) ?? "") ?? "")
    supported = log_path == "conn" || log_path == "dns" || log_path == "http" || log_path == "ssl"

    # Zeek `ts` is epoch seconds as a float -> OCSF epoch milliseconds.
    ts_raw = get(ev, ["ts"]) ?? null
    ts_float = if ts_raw != null { to_float(ts_raw) ?? null } else { null }
    ts_ms = if ts_float != null { ts_float * 1000.0 ?? null } else { null }
    ts = if ts_ms != null { to_int(ts_ms) } else { to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    # Endpoints. Zeek dotted keys (`id.orig_h`) are literal map keys, not paths.
    src_ip = to_string(get(ev, ["id.orig_h"]) ?? null) ?? null
    dst_ip = to_string(get(ev, ["id.resp_h"]) ?? null) ?? null
    src_port_raw = get(ev, ["id.orig_p"]) ?? null
    dst_port_raw = get(ev, ["id.resp_p"]) ?? null
    src_port = if src_port_raw != null { to_int(src_port_raw) ?? null } else { null }
    dst_port = if dst_port_raw != null { to_int(dst_port_raw) ?? null } else { null }

    conn_state = upcase(to_string(get(ev, ["conn_state"]) ?? "") ?? "")
    method_upper = upcase(to_string(get(ev, ["method"]) ?? "") ?? "")
    dns_answers = get(ev, ["answers"]) ?? null
    has_answers = is_array(dns_answers) && length(array(dns_answers) ?? []) > 0

    # class per _path: conn/ssl -> 4001, http -> 4002, dns -> 4003.
    class_uid = if !supported { 0 } else if log_path == "dns" { 4003 } else if log_path == "http" { 4002 } else { 4001 }
    category_uid = if class_uid == 0 { 0 } else { 4 }

    # activity_id per class (pre-computed: no `if` inside object literals).
    # conn  : S0/REJ -> 4 Fail / 5 Refuse, SF -> 1 Open, else 6 Traffic
    # ssl   : pure telemetry observation -> 6 Traffic
    # dns   : 1 Query, 2 Response (answers present)
    # http  : mapped from request method
    conn_activity_id = if conn_state == "S0" { 4 } else if conn_state == "REJ" { 5 } else if conn_state == "SF" { 1 } else { 6 }
    network_activity_id = if log_path == "conn" { conn_activity_id } else { 6 }
    dns_activity_id = if has_answers { 2 } else { 1 }
    http_activity_id = if method_upper == "GET" { 3 } else if method_upper == "POST" { 6 } else if method_upper == "PUT" { 7 } else if method_upper == "DELETE" { 2 } else if method_upper == "HEAD" { 4 } else if method_upper == "OPTIONS" { 5 } else if method_upper == "PATCH" { 9 } else if method_upper == "CONNECT" { 1 } else if method_upper == "TRACE" { 8 } else { 99 }
    activity_id = if class_uid == 4003 { dns_activity_id } else if class_uid == 4002 { http_activity_id } else { network_activity_id }

    .class_uid    = class_uid
    .category_uid = category_uid
    .severity_id  = if class_uid == 0 { 0 } else { 1 }
    .activity_id  = activity_id
    .time         = ts

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip":   src_ip,
      "port": src_port
    }

    .dst_endpoint = {
      "ip":   dst_ip,
      "port": dst_port
    }

    proto = to_string(get(ev, ["proto"]) ?? null) ?? null
    .connection_info = {
      "protocol_name": proto
    }

    # conn (4001) traffic + state
    orig_bytes_raw = get(ev, ["orig_bytes"]) ?? null
    resp_bytes_raw = get(ev, ["resp_bytes"]) ?? null
    bytes_out = if orig_bytes_raw != null { to_int(orig_bytes_raw) ?? null } else { null }
    bytes_in = if resp_bytes_raw != null { to_int(resp_bytes_raw) ?? null } else { null }
    duration_raw = get(ev, ["duration"]) ?? null
    conn_duration = if duration_raw != null { to_float(duration_raw) ?? null } else { null }
    .traffic = {
      "bytes_out": bytes_out,
      "bytes_in":  bytes_in
    }
    .duration = conn_duration
    .status_detail = to_string(get(ev, ["conn_state"]) ?? null) ?? null

    # dns (4003)
    .query = {
      "hostname": to_string(get(ev, ["query"]) ?? null) ?? null,
      "type":     to_string(get(ev, ["qtype_name"]) ?? null) ?? null,
      "rcode":    to_string(get(ev, ["rcode_name"]) ?? null) ?? null
    }
    .answers = dns_answers

    # http (4002)
    status_code_raw = get(ev, ["status_code"]) ?? null
    status_code = if status_code_raw != null { to_int(status_code_raw) ?? null } else { null }
    .http_request = {
      "http_method": to_string(get(ev, ["method"]) ?? null) ?? null,
      "url": {
        "hostname": to_string(get(ev, ["host"]) ?? null) ?? null,
        "path":     to_string(get(ev, ["uri"]) ?? null) ?? null
      },
      "user_agent": to_string(get(ev, ["user_agent"]) ?? null) ?? null
    }
    .http_response = {
      "code": status_code
    }

    # ssl (4001) — no dedicated TLS index, observation carried in `.tls`
    .tls = {
      "sni":               to_string(get(ev, ["server_name"]) ?? null) ?? null,
      "version":           to_string(get(ev, ["version"]) ?? null) ?? null,
      "validation_status": to_string(get(ev, ["validation_status"]) ?? null) ?? null
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Zeek",
        "vendor_name": "Zeek"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0"
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "zeek_path": log_path
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()

  del(.message)
  del(.file)
  del(.host)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTERS / ROUTES ---
[transforms.zeek_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["zeek_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 0'

[transforms.zeek_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["zeek_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 0'

[transforms.zeek_route_by_class]
type   = "route"
inputs = ["zeek_filter_valid"]
route.network = '.class_uid == 4001'
route.http    = '.class_uid == 4002'
route.dns     = '.class_uid == 4003'

[transforms.zeek_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["zeek_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "network/zeek",
    "parser":        "zeek",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "zeek_json_invalid_or_unsupported_path",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINKS : Quickwit OCSF ---
[sinks.zeek_quickwit_network]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["zeek_route_by_class.network"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-network/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.zeek_quickwit_network.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.zeek_quickwit_http]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["zeek_route_by_class.http"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-http/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.zeek_quickwit_http.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

[sinks.zeek_quickwit_dns]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["zeek_route_by_class.dns"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-dns/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.zeek_quickwit_dns.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.zeek_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["zeek_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.zeek_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les logs Cloudflare `http_requests` exportes en JSON line-delimited par Logpull, par un export object storage, ou par un futur fetcher Kolektor. Normalise en OCSF classe 4002 (HTTP Activity).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Cloudflare HTTP Requests — Logpush / Logpull JSON
# OCSF Class : 4002 (HTTP Activity)
# Input      : File (JSON per line)
# Tested with: Cloudflare Logs http_requests dataset
# ==============================================================================

[sources.cloudflare_http_file]
type    = "file"
include = ["${CLOUDFLARE_HTTP_LOG:-/var/lib/kolektor/fetcher/cloudflare-http.jsonl}"]

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.cloudflare_http_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["cloudflare_http_file"]
source = '''
  tenant_id = "${TENANT_ID}"
  datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = if exists(.message) { string!(.message) } else { encode_json(.) }
  parsed = if exists(.message) { parse_json(raw_msg) ?? null } else { . }
  valid_json = is_object(parsed)

  if valid_json {
    cf = object!(parsed)

    method = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientRequestMethod"]) ?? null) ?? null
    host = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientRequestHost"]) ?? null) ?? null
    uri = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientRequestURI"]) ?? null) ?? null
    path_raw = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientRequestPath"]) ?? null) ?? null
    scheme = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientRequestScheme"]) ?? null) ?? null
    protocol = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientRequestProtocol"]) ?? null) ?? null
    user_agent = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientRequestUserAgent"]) ?? null) ?? null
    referer = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientRequestReferer"]) ?? null) ?? null
    src_ip = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientIP"]) ?? null) ?? null

    status_raw = get(cf, ["EdgeResponseStatus"]) ?? null
    status_code = if status_raw != null { to_int(status_raw) ?? 0 } else { 0 }
    edge_bytes_raw = get(cf, ["EdgeResponseBytes"]) ?? null
    if edge_bytes_raw == null {
      edge_bytes_raw = get(cf, ["EdgeResponseBodyBytes"]) ?? null
    }
    edge_bytes = if edge_bytes_raw != null { to_int(edge_bytes_raw) ?? null } else { null }
    req_bytes_raw = get(cf, ["ClientRequestBytes"]) ?? null
    req_bytes = if req_bytes_raw != null { to_int(req_bytes_raw) ?? null } else { null }

    ray_id = to_string(get(cf, ["RayID"]) ?? null) ?? null
    parent_ray_id = to_string(get(cf, ["ParentRayID"]) ?? null) ?? null
    edge_colo = to_string(get(cf, ["EdgeColoCode"]) ?? null) ?? null
    country = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientCountry"]) ?? null) ?? null
    asn_raw = get(cf, ["ClientASN"]) ?? null
    asn = if asn_raw != null { to_int(asn_raw) ?? null } else { null }
    cache_status = to_string(get(cf, ["CacheCacheStatus"]) ?? null) ?? null
    origin_status_raw = get(cf, ["OriginResponseStatus"]) ?? null
    origin_status = if origin_status_raw != null { to_int(origin_status_raw) ?? null } else { null }
    request_source = to_string(get(cf, ["ClientRequestSource"]) ?? null) ?? null

    security_action = to_string(get(cf, ["SecurityAction"]) ?? null) ?? null
    security_actions = get(cf, ["SecurityActions"]) ?? null
    security_rule_ids = get(cf, ["SecurityRuleIDs"]) ?? null
    security_sources = get(cf, ["SecuritySources"]) ?? null
    security_action_lc = if security_action != null { downcase!(security_action) } else { "" }
    security_actions_lc = downcase(encode_json(security_actions))
    has_security_signal = (security_action_lc != "" && security_action_lc != "unknown") || (security_actions_lc != "null" && security_actions_lc != "[]")
    is_mitigated = contains(security_action_lc, "block") || contains(security_action_lc, "challenge") || contains(security_action_lc, "connectionclose") || contains(security_actions_lc, "block") || contains(security_actions_lc, "challenge") || contains(security_actions_lc, "connectionclose")

    ts_raw = get(cf, ["EdgeStartTimestamp"]) ?? null
    if ts_raw == null {
      ts_raw = get(cf, ["EdgeEndTimestamp"]) ?? null
    }
    if ts_raw == null {
      ts_raw = get(cf, ["Datetime"]) ?? null
    }
    ts = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
    if ts_raw != null {
      if is_integer(ts_raw) || is_float(ts_raw) {
        ts_num = to_int(ts_raw) ?? 0
        ts = if ts_num > 1000000000000000 {
          to_int(ts_num / 1000000)
        } else if ts_num > 1000000000000 {
          ts_num
        } else if ts_num > 1000000000 {
          ts_num * 1000
        } else {
          ts
        }
      } else {
        ts_str = to_string(ts_raw) ?? ""
        parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%+") ?? null
        ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { ts }
      }
    }

    valid = method != null && method != "" && host != null && host != ""
    path = if path_raw != null && path_raw != "" { path_raw } else { uri }
    referrer_value = if referer != null && referer != "-" && referer != "" { referer } else { null }
    # OCSF 4002 activity_id from HTTP method (pre-computed: no if in object literal)
    method_upper = if method != null { upcase(method) ?? "" } else { "" }
    activity_id = if method_upper == "GET" { 3 } else if method_upper == "POST" { 6 } else if method_upper == "PUT" { 7 } else if method_upper == "DELETE" { 2 } else if method_upper == "HEAD" { 4 } else if method_upper == "OPTIONS" { 5 } else if method_upper == "PATCH" { 9 } else if method_upper == "CONNECT" { 1 } else if method_upper == "TRACE" { 8 } else { 99 }
    ocsf_severity = if is_mitigated { 3 } else if status_code >= 500 { 4 } else if status_code >= 400 { 2 } else { 1 }
    status = if status_code >= 400 || is_mitigated { "Failure" } else { "Success" }
    status_id = if status_code >= 400 || is_mitigated { 2 } else { 1 }

    if valid {
      . = {
        "uid":           uuid_v4(),
        "tenant_id":     tenant_id,
        "datasource_id": datasource_id,
        "received_time": received_time,
        "time":          ts,
        "class_uid":     4002,
        "category_uid":  4,
        "severity_id":   ocsf_severity,
        "activity_id":   activity_id,
        "status":        status,
        "status_id":     status_id,
        "http_request": {
          "http_method": method,
          "url": {
            "hostname": host,
            "path":     path,
            "scheme":   scheme
          },
          "version":    protocol,
          "referrer":   referrer_value,
          "user_agent": user_agent
        },
        "http_response": {
          "code": status_code
        },
        "src_endpoint": {
          "ip":  src_ip,
          "asn": asn,
          "location": {
            "country": country
          }
        },
        "traffic": {
          "bytes_in":  req_bytes,
          "bytes_out": edge_bytes
        },
        "metadata": {
          "product": {
            "name":        "Cloudflare HTTP Requests",
            "vendor_name": "Cloudflare"
          },
          "version": "1.0.0",
          "uid":     ray_id
        },
        "unmapped": {
          "ray_id":             ray_id,
          "parent_ray_id":      parent_ray_id,
          "edge_colo":          edge_colo,
          "cache_status":       cache_status,
          "origin_status":      origin_status,
          "client_country":     country,
          "client_asn":         asn,
          "request_source":     request_source,
          "security_signal":    has_security_signal,
          "security_action":    security_action,
          "security_actions":   security_actions,
          "security_rule_ids":  security_rule_ids,
          "security_sources":   security_sources,
          "bot_score":          get(cf, ["BotScore"]) ?? null,
          "bot_score_src":      to_string(get(cf, ["BotScoreSrc"]) ?? null) ?? null,
          "bot_tags":           get(cf, ["BotTags"]) ?? null,
          "ja3_hash":           to_string(get(cf, ["JA3Hash"]) ?? null) ?? null,
          "ja4":                to_string(get(cf, ["JA4"]) ?? null) ?? null,
          "waf_attack_score":   get(cf, ["WAFAttackScore"]) ?? null,
          "waf_rce_score":      get(cf, ["WAFRCEAttackScore"]) ?? null,
          "waf_sqli_score":     get(cf, ["WAFSQLiAttackScore"]) ?? null,
          "waf_xss_score":      get(cf, ["WAFXSSAttackScore"]) ?? null
        },
        "raw": raw_msg
      }
    } else {
      . = {
        "uid":           uuid_v4(),
        "tenant_id":     tenant_id,
        "datasource_id": datasource_id,
        "received_time": received_time,
        "time":          ts,
        "class_uid":     0,
        "category_uid":  0,
        "severity_id":   0,
        "raw":           raw_msg
      }
    }
  } else {
    . = {
      "uid":           uuid_v4(),
      "tenant_id":     tenant_id,
      "datasource_id": datasource_id,
      "received_time": received_time,
      "time":          to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds"),
      "class_uid":     0,
      "category_uid":  0,
      "severity_id":   0,
      "raw":           raw_msg
    }
  }
'''

# --- FILTERS ---
[transforms.cloudflare_http_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["cloudflare_http_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 4002'

[transforms.cloudflare_http_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["cloudflare_http_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 4002'

[transforms.cloudflare_http_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["cloudflare_http_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "web/cloudflare-http",
    "parser":        "cloudflare-http",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "cloudflare_http_json_or_required_fields_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ---
[sinks.cloudflare_http_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["cloudflare_http_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-http/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.cloudflare_http_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.cloudflare_http_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["cloudflare_http_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.cloudflare_http_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

parsers.description: Collecte les access logs nginx (format combined). Normalise en OCSF classe 4002 (HTTP Activity).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Nginx — combined access log + error log
# OCSF Class : 4002 (HTTP Activity)
# Input      : File or Syslog
# Tested with: nginx 1.24.x / 1.26.x
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.nginx_input]
type    = "file"
include = ["${NGINX_ACCESS_LOG:-/var/log/nginx/access.log}"]

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.nginx_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["nginx_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = string!(.message)

  # Nginx combined log format :
  # 10.0.0.1 - user [14/Apr/2024:10:23:45 +0000] "GET /path HTTP/1.1" 200 1234 "https://ref.com" "Mozilla/5.0 ..."
  parsed = parse_regex(raw_msg, r'^(?P<remote_addr>\S+)\s+-\s+(?P<remote_user>\S+)\s+\[(?P<time_local>[^\]]+)\]\s+"(?P<method>\S+)\s+(?P<uri>\S+)\s+(?P<protocol>[^"]+)"\s+(?P<status>\d+)\s+(?P<body_bytes>\d+)\s+"(?P<referer>[^"]*?)"\s+"(?P<user_agent>[^"]*?)"') ?? {}

  remote_addr = parsed.remote_addr
  valid = is_string(remote_addr) && remote_addr != ""

  if valid {
    method = parsed.method
    uri = parsed.uri
    protocol = parsed.protocol
    status_code = to_int!(parsed.status)
    body_bytes = to_int!(parsed.body_bytes)
    user_agent = parsed.user_agent
    referer = parsed.referer
    remote_user = parsed.remote_user

    # Pre-compute conditional values (VRL forbids if inside object literals)
    referrer_value = if referer != "-" { referer } else { null }
    actor_name = if remote_user != "-" { remote_user } else { null }

    # Parse timestamp : 14/Apr/2024:10:23:45 +0000
    ts_str = parsed.time_local
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str, format: "%d/%b/%Y:%H:%M:%S %z") ?? null
    ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    # Severity based on HTTP status
    ocsf_severity = if status_code >= 500 { 4 } else if status_code >= 400 { 2 } else { 1 }

    # OCSF 4002 activity_id from HTTP method (pre-computed: no if in object literal)
    method_upper = upcase(method) ?? ""
    activity_id = if method_upper == "GET" { 3 } else if method_upper == "POST" { 6 } else if method_upper == "PUT" { 7 } else if method_upper == "DELETE" { 2 } else if method_upper == "HEAD" { 4 } else if method_upper == "OPTIONS" { 5 } else if method_upper == "PATCH" { 9 } else if method_upper == "CONNECT" { 1 } else if method_upper == "TRACE" { 8 } else { 99 }

    .class_uid    = 4002
    .category_uid = 4
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .activity_id  = activity_id
    .time         = ts

    .http_request = {
      "http_method": method,
      "url": {
        "path":     uri,
        "scheme":   "http"
      },
      "version":    protocol,
      "referrer":   referrer_value,
      "user_agent": user_agent
    }

    .http_response = {
      "code": status_code
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip": remote_addr
    }

    .actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": actor_name
      }
    }

    .traffic = {
      "bytes_out": body_bytes
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "nginx",
        "vendor_name": "F5/nginx"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0"
    }

    .unmapped = {}
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = del(.message)
  .uid = uuid_v4()
  del(.file)
  del(.host)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop malformed ---
[transforms.nginx_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["nginx_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 4002'

[transforms.nginx_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["nginx_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 4002'

[transforms.nginx_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["nginx_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "web/nginx",
    "parser":        "nginx",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "nginx_combined_log_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ---
[sinks.nginx_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["nginx_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-http/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.nginx_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.nginx_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["nginx_raw_failed"]

parsers.description: Collecte les access logs Traefik (format JSON structure). Normalise en OCSF classe 4002 (HTTP Activity).
parsers.vector_toml:
# ==============================================================================
# Traefik — access log JSON
# OCSF Class : 4002 (HTTP Activity)
# Input      : File (JSON per line)
# Tested with: Traefik v2.11 / v3.x (access log format=json)
# ==============================================================================

# --- SOURCE ---
[sources.traefik_input]
type    = "file"
include = ["${TRAEFIK_ACCESS_LOG:-/var/log/traefik/access.log}"]

# --- TRANSFORM : parse + normalisation OCSF ---
[transforms.traefik_parse_and_normalize]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["traefik_input"]
source = '''
  .tenant_id     = "${TENANT_ID}"
  .datasource_id = "${DATASOURCE_ID}"
  .received_time = to_unix_timestamp(now(), unit: "milliseconds")

  raw_msg = string!(.message)
  parsed = parse_json(raw_msg) ?? null
  valid = is_object(parsed)

  if valid {
    # Injecter les cles JSON a la racine pour acceder aux champs avec tirets via la syntaxe path VRL (ex: ."request_User-Agent")
    . = merge(., object!(parsed))

    # exists() obligatoire : to_string(null) renvoie "" en VRL, pas null
    method      = if exists(.RequestMethod)       { to_string(.RequestMethod)       ?? null } else { null }
    path        = if exists(.RequestPath)         { to_string(.RequestPath)         ?? null } else { null }
    proto       = if exists(.RequestProtocol)     { to_string(.RequestProtocol)     ?? null } else { null }
    host        = if exists(.RequestHost)         { to_string(.RequestHost)         ?? null } else { null }
    scheme      = if exists(.RequestScheme)       { to_string(.RequestScheme)       ?? "http" } else { "http" }
    status_code = if exists(.DownstreamStatus)    { to_int(.DownstreamStatus)       ?? 0 } else { 0 }
    bytes_out   = if exists(.DownstreamContentSize) { to_int(.DownstreamContentSize) ?? 0 } else { 0 }
    bytes_in    = if exists(.RequestContentSize)  { to_int(.RequestContentSize)     ?? 0 } else { 0 }
    client_ip   = if exists(.ClientHost)          { to_string(.ClientHost)          ?? null } else { null }
    client_user = if exists(.ClientUsername)      { to_string(.ClientUsername)      ?? null } else { null }
    user_agent  = if exists(."request_User-Agent") { to_string(."request_User-Agent") ?? null } else { null }
    referer     = if exists(."request_Referer")   { to_string(."request_Referer")   ?? null } else { null }
    duration_ns = if exists(.Duration)            { to_int(.Duration)               ?? 0 } else { 0 }
    router      = if exists(.RouterName)          { to_string(.RouterName)          ?? null } else { null }
    service     = if exists(.ServiceName)         { to_string(.ServiceName)         ?? null } else { null }

    # Timestamp : ISO 8601
    ts_str_raw = if exists(.StartUTC) { to_string(.StartUTC) ?? "" } else if exists(.time) { to_string(.time) ?? "" } else { "" }
    parsed_ts = parse_timestamp(ts_str_raw, format: "%+") ?? null
    ts = if parsed_ts != null { to_unix_timestamp!(parsed_ts, unit: "milliseconds") } else { to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds") }

    # Severity selon status HTTP
    ocsf_severity = if status_code >= 500 { 4 } else if status_code >= 400 { 2 } else { 1 }

    # Pre-calcul (VRL interdit les if dans les object literals)
    referrer_value = if referer != null && referer != "-" && referer != "" { referer } else { null }
    actor_name = if client_user != null && client_user != "-" && client_user != "" { client_user } else { null }

    # OCSF 4002 activity_id depuis la methode HTTP (pre-calcule : pas de if dans un object literal)
    method_upper = if method != null { upcase(method) ?? "" } else { "" }
    activity_id = if method_upper == "GET" { 3 } else if method_upper == "POST" { 6 } else if method_upper == "PUT" { 7 } else if method_upper == "DELETE" { 2 } else if method_upper == "HEAD" { 4 } else if method_upper == "OPTIONS" { 5 } else if method_upper == "PATCH" { 9 } else if method_upper == "CONNECT" { 1 } else if method_upper == "TRACE" { 8 } else { 99 }

    .class_uid    = 4002
    .category_uid = 4
    .severity_id  = ocsf_severity
    .activity_id  = activity_id
    .time         = ts

    .http_request = {
      "http_method": method,
      "url": {
        "path":     path,
        "hostname": host,
        "scheme":   scheme
      },
      "version":    proto,
      "referrer":   referrer_value,
      "user_agent": user_agent
    }

    .http_response = {
      "code": status_code
    }

    .src_endpoint = {
      "ip": client_ip
    }

    .actor = {
      "user": {
        "name": actor_name
      }
    }

    .traffic = {
      "bytes_in":  bytes_in,
      "bytes_out": bytes_out
    }

    .metadata = {
      "product": {
        "name":        "Traefik",
        "vendor_name": "Traefik Labs"
      },
      "version": "1.0.0"
    }

    .unmapped = {
      "router_name":  router,
      "service_name": service,
      "duration_ns":  duration_ns
    }
  } else {
    .class_uid    = 0
    .category_uid = 0
    .severity_id  = 0
    .time         = to_unix_timestamp!(now(), unit: "milliseconds")
  }

  .raw = raw_msg
  .uid = uuid_v4()

  # Nettoyer les cles brutes Traefik injectees par merge()
  del(.ClientAddr)
  del(.ClientHost)
  del(.ClientPort)
  del(.ClientUsername)
  del(.DownstreamContentSize)
  del(.DownstreamStatus)
  del(.Duration)
  del(.OriginContentSize)
  del(.OriginDuration)
  del(.OriginStatus)
  del(.Overhead)
  del(.RequestAddr)
  del(.RequestContentSize)
  del(.RequestHost)
  del(.RequestMethod)
  del(.RequestPath)
  del(.RequestPort)
  del(.RequestProtocol)
  del(.RequestScheme)
  del(.RetryAttempts)
  del(.RouterName)
  del(.ServiceAddr)
  del(.ServiceName)
  del(.ServiceURL)
  del(.StartLocal)
  del(.StartUTC)
  del(.TLSCipher)
  del(.TLSVersion)
  del(.entryPointName)
  del(.level)
  del(.msg)
  del(."request_User-Agent")
  del(."request_Referer")
  del(."downstream_Content-Type")
  del(.message)
  del(.file)
  del(.host)
  del(.source_type)
'''

# --- FILTER : drop malformed ---
[transforms.traefik_filter_valid]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["traefik_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid == 4002'

[transforms.traefik_filter_failed]
type      = "filter"
inputs    = ["traefik_parse_and_normalize"]
condition = '.class_uid != 4002'

[transforms.traefik_raw_failed]
type   = "remap"
inputs = ["traefik_filter_failed"]
source = '''
  . = {
    "uid":           .uid,
    "time":          .time,
    "received_time": .received_time,
    "tenant_id":     .tenant_id,
    "datasource_id": .datasource_id,
    "source_type":   "web/traefik",
    "parser":        "traefik",
    "parse_status":  "failed",
    "parse_error":   "traefik_json_invalid",
    "raw":           .raw
  }
'''

# --- SINK : Quickwit ---
[sinks.traefik_quickwit]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["traefik_filter_valid"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/ocsf-http/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.traefik_quickwit.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"

# --- SINK : Quickwit raw-logs (echecs de parsing uniquement) ---
[sinks.traefik_quickwit_raw_failed]
type                = "http"
inputs              = ["traefik_raw_failed"]
uri                 = "${QUICKWIT_ENDPOINT}/api/v1/raw-logs/ingest"
encoding.codec      = "json"
framing.method      = "newline_delimited"
batch.max_events    = 1000
batch.timeout_secs  = 5

[sinks.traefik_quickwit_raw_failed.request]
headers.Content-Type = "application/x-ndjson"
